options.name: -abuttedToBoundaryOnly
options.description: Specifies to promote selected macro pin if macro pin is abutted with partition boundary.

options.name: -insts
options.description: Specifies name of the instances, wildcard can be specified

options.name: -layers
options.description: Specifies layers of the macro pins.

options.name: -override
options.description: Specifies to override specific promoted pin selection.

options.name: -pins
options.description: Specifies name of the macro pins, wildcard can be specified

options.name: -reportOnlyFile
options.description: Specifies all setPromotedMacroPin settings into an output TCL file.

options.name: -reset
options.description: Specifies to reset all promoted pin selection.
